source_note: Sanitized public summary derived from private RANI_OS registers. Public preview does not expose private source details.

groups.count: 60+ artifacts and validations across RTM namespace

why_task_count_looked_small.reason: Task List shows active/recent execution slice only
why_task_count_looked_small.meaning: It is not the full backlog.
It is not the same as task records.
Most completed/managed work lives as artifacts, not active tasks.

why_task_count_looked_small.reason: Candidate Register is not a scheduler
why_task_count_looked_small.meaning: It stores managed candidates but must not auto-select work.
It summarizes private registers without exposing full internal detail.

why_task_count_looked_small.reason: Mobile now collapses deep inventory by default
why_task_count_looked_small.meaning: The data remains available, but the phone view starts with action panels.

next_dashboard_improvements.label: Generate a sanitized candidate-register count table
Add closed / active / deferred / behavior-pass totals
Connect dashboard to generated repository state instead of hand-maintained JSON
Compress mobile dashboard with collapsible panels and card rows
